hero.title: Prayer and Spiritual Formation

lectio.description: A five-stage Scripture meditation guided by an AI assistant.

community.title: Community

home.disclaimer: The reflection assistant helps you organize your thoughts and return to prayer. It does not replace a priest, confessor, spiritual director, or therapist.

emotion.placeholder: How are you feeling right now? What is on your heart?

crisis.title: You are not alone.
crisis.note: You can also speak with a priest, spiritual director, or therapist. Your life has value.
crisis.scripture: "The Lord is near to the brokenhearted and saves the crushed in spirit." — Ps 34:18

feedback.thanks: Thank you for your feedback — it helps us improve content quality.
